contentBlocks.title: When do you need to convert cm to inches?
contentBlocks.html:
Centimeter (cm) is a metric length unit equal to 1/100 of a meter. Inch (in or ″) is an imperial unit equal to exactly 2.54 cm. The conversion factor is precise and internationally standardized since 1959.

Converting cm to inches is essential when buying monitors and TVs (screen diagonals are in inches), clothing from US or UK stores, furniture from US catalogs, and bicycles (wheel and frame sizes are in inches).

In electronics: smartphone screens (6.1″ = 15.49 cm), laptops (15.6″ = 39.62 cm), and US paper sizes (Letter: 8.5 × 11″).

Height in the US is given in feet and inches: 5'9″ = 175.26 cm. Knowing the conversion is useful for visa forms and medical records abroad.

contentBlocks.title: How does cm to inches conversion work?
contentBlocks.html:
The conversion is based on the international definition established in 1959: one inch equals exactly 2.54 centimeters. This is one of the few units with an exact, unrounded conversion factor.

To convert cm to inches, divide by 2.54. For example: 10 cm / 2.54 = 3.937 inches. To convert inches to cm, multiply by 2.54.

The converter displays results with full precision. The cm-to-inches conversion factor is particularly useful when comparing screen sizes (specified in inches) with physical dimensions in the metric system.

contentBlocks.title: Practical tips
contentBlocks.html:
• Screen diagonal: 1″ = 2.54 cm. A 55″ TV has a diagonal of 139.7 cm.
  • Height: 6'0″ (6 feet) = 182.88 cm. 1 foot = 12 inches = 30.48 cm.
  • Paper: A4 = 21 × 29.7 cm. US Letter = 8.5 × 11″ = 21.59 × 27.94 cm.
  • Waist size: 32″ (pants) = 81.28 cm.

items.question: How many centimeters is 1 inch?
items.answer: Exactly 2.54 cm. This is the international definition established in 1959.

items.question: How do I convert a TV diagonal to centimeters?
items.answer: Multiply inches by 2.54. For example: 65″ TV has a diagonal of 165.1 cm.

items.question: How many cm is 5'10″?
items.answer: 5 feet 10 inches = 70 inches = 177.8 cm. Convert feet to inches (5×12=60), add remaining inches, multiply by 2.54.

items.question: Is 1 inch exactly 2.54 cm?
items.answer: Yes. Since 1959, the international inch is defined as exactly 25.4 mm (2.54 cm). This is a precise definition, not an approximation.

items.question: How can I quickly estimate inches to cm?
items.answer: Multiply inches by 2.5 — the result will be about 1.6% less than exact. Example: 10″ × 2.5 = 25 cm (exact: 25.4 cm).
